So apartment IQ, if you haven't uh kind of dove in quite yet or really dug into the content, Apartment IQ is a data analytic tool uh that streamlines the market survey process.

So we find that a lot of folks currently, when they're collecting market survey information, generally do so very manually either in an Excel spreadsheet uh calling around to get pricing uh and things of that nature or sourcing it out themselves.
Um But what apartment IQ does is we hope to kind of remove that barrier for you uh And give you time back.
Uh Ultimately, our hope is to save you time.
Uh because we know that you're very busy, especially if you're working on site uh working with people and potential renters.
Uh We know that you have very little time uh in regards to trying to figure out what your competition is doing.
So we hope that this will be a tool that you leverage uh day in day out to help you uh capture that rental audience.
Um Apartment IQ has 100% public data and I know that there's a lot of concerns right now regarding uh privacy uh and private data sharing.
Uh So just to put your mind at ease, we are 100% public.
We also update the data every 24 hours.

So rather than getting, you know, updated pricing once a week, once a month, uh you're getting everything at your fingertips updated every 24 hours, uh which can really put you in the driver's seat uh to make really informed decisions.
